'''paluvu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:qilaut|qilaut]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-l-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:qilaut|qilaut]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| paluvu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:pælivith|pælivith]] || [[word:pælivij|pælivij]] || [[word:pælivish|pælivish]] || [[word:pælivi|pælivi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:paluluvuth|paluluvuth]] || [[word:paluluvuj|paluluvuj]] || [[word:paluluvush|paluluvush]] || [[word:paluluvu|paluluvu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:paluvuth|paluvuth]] || [[word:paluvuj|paluvuj]] || [[word:paluvush|paluvush]] || [[word:paluvu|paluvu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:palufvuth|palufvuth]] || [[word:palufvuj|palufvuj]] || [[word:palufvush|palufvush]] || [[word:palufvuf|palufvuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:paluvuthu|paluvuthu]] || [[word:paluvuju|paluvuju]] || [[word:paluvushu|paluvushu]] || [[word:paluvuku|paluvuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:paluvuth|paluvuth]] || [[word:paluvuj|paluvuj]] || [[word:paluvush|paluvush]] || [[word:paluvu|paluvu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:paluvuthul|paluvuthul]] || [[word:paluvujul|paluvujul]] || [[word:paluvushul|paluvushul]] || [[word:paluvukul|paluvukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:paluvuthuthu|paluvuthuthu]] || [[word:paluvujuju|paluvujuju]] || [[word:paluvushushu|paluvushushu]] || [[word:paluvuku|paluvuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:paluvuthun|paluvuthun]] || [[word:paluvujun|paluvujun]] || [[word:paluvushun|paluvushun]] || [[word:paluvukun|paluvukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:paluvuthuoro|paluvuthuoro]] || [[word:paluvujuoro|paluvujuoro]] || [[word:paluvushuoro|paluvushuoro]] || [[word:paluvukuoro|paluvukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|16f482d}}
